---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement to existing behaviour.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!-- Describe the situation that prompted the request. What were you
trying to do when you wished Urika could do this? -->

## What would you like Urika to do?

<!-- Describe the feature or behaviour change. As specific as you can
— e.g. "a `--export pdf` flag on `urika report`" is more
actionable than "better export options". -->

## Have you tried any workarounds?

<!-- What you've already tried, if anything — manual steps, scripts,
existing Urika features that get part of the way. Helps us judge
how much friction the missing feature is causing. -->

## Who else benefits?

<!-- Optional: is this a one-off for your specific project, or
something other researchers in your field (or another field) would
also use? -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Optional: links to similar features in other tools, mockups,
example output you'd like to see, etc. -->
